FOnline ThirdParty pruning notes

This vendored copy is intentionally trimmed for the engine build. When updating
from upstream, remove these paths again after copying the new version.

Removed paths:
- android-project/app/jni/
- android-project/app/src/main/res/
- android-project/gradle/
- build-scripts/
- cmake/test/
- docs/
- examples/
- src/test/
- src/hidapi/windows/test/
- VisualC/
- VisualC-GDK/
- Xcode/
- .clang-format
- .clang-tidy
- .editorconfig
- .gitignore
- .wikiheaders-options
- Android.mk
- android-project/app/build.gradle
- android-project/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml
- android-project/build.gradle
- android-project/gradle.properties
- android-project/gradlew
- android-project/gradlew.bat
- android-project/settings.gradle
- BUGS.txt
- include/SDL3/SDL_test*.h
